title: Stayneria neilii

Studies have shown that Stayneria neilii has potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential in treating various conditions such as infections and inflammation. Stayneria neilii is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
taxonomy: Stayneria neilii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Liliaceae. It is a genus of monocotyledonous plants, native to the Himalayas.
